name: more-minimap-autohide!
title: More Minimap Autohide!
author: leoric
description:
Automatically hides the minimap when hovering over certain entities to prevent the sidebar from cutting off on smaller screens. Also disables the minimap on space platforms.

Combined replacement for 'More Minimap Autohide' (by kubiixx & ReubenAaron) and 'No Minimap on Platforms' (by Quezler).
